# Shylock

> Communication infrastructure for AI. Build and deploy AI agents that communicate with millions of your customers in minutes, not months.

Shylock is an AI voice and messaging platform. Build agents that call, message, and collect across voice, WhatsApp, SMS, and email. One platform, every conversation.

## Product

- AI agent studio — describe your agent and deploy in seconds.
- Multi-channel outreach: voice, WhatsApp, SMS, and email.
- Local phone numbers in 40+ countries. 30+ languages.
- Real-time transcripts, recordings, and outcome tracking.
- Integrated with ElevenLabs, OpenAI, Google, Deepgram, Anthropic, and more.

## Sauti API

Programmatic access to calls, messages, and agents. RESTful endpoints, webhook events, full control.

- Base URL: https://sauti.shylock.ai/api
- Initiate outbound calls, send messages, create assistants, receive webhooks.

## Company
